objective: Build a market participation breadth feature layer from the accepted Tushare daily-only raw OHLCV lineage, with an explicit raw-adjustment guard and no stock-return labels.
forbidden: Do not run a portfolio backtest.
Do not generate NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or portfolio-return outputs.
Do not create stock-return labels from raw unadjusted Tushare daily prices.
Do not create adjusted-return or total-return fields.
Do not promote market participation breadth features into the default model.
Do not tune V3.64/V3.65 same-branch MARKET proxy thresholds.
acceptance_criteria: V3.66 queue must contain the V3.67 Tushare daily-only breadth feature task.
V3.44 raw daily guard must allow market breadth use with raw-boundary and hard-block adjusted/total-return uses.
Feature panel must have at least 6000 dates and the latest asset count must be at least 4000.
All feature rows must be after-close for next-trade-date use.
Raw adjustment guard and feature quality checks must pass.
No output CSV column contains forbidden performance or promotion terms.
failure_conditions: Any output creates stock-level return labels from raw prices.
Any output allows portfolio harness or model promotion.
Any adjusted-return, total-return, NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, or portfolio-return output is produced.
quality_gates: agent_run_manifest.json satisfies the manifest required field schema.
Forbidden performance or promotion column scan returns zero hits.
Secret leak scan returns zero paths.
next_handoff: factor_researcher should start V3.68 industry breadth and dispersion feature-layer construction from SW industry daily index data.
